Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–514, title XV, § 1556(c)100 Stat. 2755Oct. 22, 1986“(1).—In generalExcept as provided in paragraph (2), the amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending sections 7456 and 7471 of this title] shall take effect on the date of the enactment of this Act [].Oct. 22, 1986“(2).—SalarySubsection (d) of section 7443A of the Internal Revenue Code of 1954 [now 1986] (as added by this section) shall take effect on the 1st day of the 1st month beginning after the date of the enactment of this Act [].Oct. 22, 1986“(3).—New appointments not requiredNothing in the amendments made by this section shall be construed to require the reappointment of any individual serving as a special trial judge of the Tax Court on the day before the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Oct. 22, 1986

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: a Appointment
children.text: The chief judge may, from time to time, appoint special trial judges who shall proceed under such rules and regulations as may be promulgated by the Tax Court.

children.heading: Proceedings which may be assigned to special trial judges
children.label: b Proceedings which may be assigned to special trial judges

children.text: any proceeding where neither the amount of the deficiency placed in dispute (within the meaning of section 7463) nor the amount of any claimed overpayment exceeds $50,000,
any other proceeding which the chief judge may designate,

children.heading: Authority to make court decision
children.label: c Authority to make court decision
children.text: The court may authorize a special trial judge to make the decision of the court with respect to any proceeding described in paragraph (1), (2), (3), (4), (5), or (6) of subsection (b), subject to such conditions and review as the court may provide.
at a rate equal to 90 percent of the rate for judges of the Tax Court, and
in the same installments as such judges.

children.heading: Expenses for travel and subsistence
children.label: e Expenses for travel and subsistence
children.text: Subsection (d) of section 7443 shall apply to special trial judges subject to such rules and regulations as may be promulgated by the Tax Court.
